description_long: This is a two-tone baseball cap featuring a structured, rounded crown and a curved brim. The front panels and brim are made of a dark fabric, likely cotton or a cotton blend, with visible white stitching outlining the brim and crown seams. The side and back panels are constructed from a light tan mesh material, providing breathability and a classic trucker cap appearance. The back of the cap includes an adjustable plastic snap closure, allowing for a customizable fit. The cap is devoid of any visible logos, patches, or decorative elements, giving it a simple and utilitarian look.
description: A two-tone baseball cap with a dark fabric front and brim, tan mesh back panels, and white stitching, featuring an adjustable snap closure.
description_view_0: Front view showing the dark fabric crown and brim with white stitching and two ventilation eyelets.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the transition from the dark fabric front to the tan mesh back and the curved brim.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tan mesh panels and the adjustable plastic snap closure.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view emphasizing the mesh construction and the seamless integration with the dark fabric front.
attribute_brim_style: curved, medium-width brim with visible stitching
attribute_crown_shape: rounded, structured crown with front panels
